contract_claim: In TCP server mode, each new client connection overwrites `this.connection` (L149). If a second client connects while the first is still active, the first client's responses will be silently dropped — `sendResponse`/`sendEvent` always use `this.connection` which now points to the second client.
observed_behavior: In TCP server mode, each new client connection overwrites `this.connection` (L149). If a second client connects while the first is still active, the first client's responses will be silently dropped — `sendResponse`/`sendEvent` always use `this.connection` which now points to the second client.
